hooks.prompt: A .ts file was just modified. Check if it appears to be a TypeScript CLI project file (part of a monorepo with Commander/Zod/Chalk). If yes, verify: single quotes used, 4-space indentation, .js extension in relative imports, no banned dependencies (ts-node, jest, inquirer, chalk 4, oclif, Joi). Report any violations briefly.

A subagent just completed. Check if it generated or modified any TypeScript CLI project files. If yes, verify the generated code follows coding-plans-statusline conventions: ESM only, single quotes, 4-space indent, .spec.ts test naming, barrel exports, Commander+Zod+Chalk 5.x usage. Report any convention violations.
